Hello! 👋 Welcome to Moresave SACCO Customer Support!

I'm your virtual assistant. I'm here to help you with questions about:
• 💰 Savings & Deposits
• 🏦 Loans & Repayments
• 📈 Dividends
• 🔐 Account Access
• 📞 Contact & Office Information

Please type your question and I'll do my best to help you right away!

Thank you for contacting Moresave SACCO Support! 🙏

I've received your message and a staff member will review it and respond to you shortly during office hours (Mon–Fri, 8AM–5PM).

For urgent matters, please call us at **+256 700 000000**.

Is there anything specific I can try to help you with right now?
Our staff will work on you soon

Hello! 👋 Welcome to Moresave SACCO Customer Support!

I'm your virtual assistant. I'm here to help you with questions about:
• 💰 Savings & Deposits
• 🏦 Loans & Repayments

Please type your question and I'll do my best to help you right away!
how can i apply for a loan

Thank you for your inquiry! 🏦

At Moresave SACCO, you can apply for a loan if you meet the following criteria:
• You must be an active member for at least 3 months
• Your loan can be up to 3x your current savings balance
• Repayment periods range from 6 to 36 months
• Monthly interest rate is 2%

To apply, go to **Apply for Loan** in your dashboard. A loan officer will review your application within 2-3 working days. Is there anything else I can help you with?
